title: macaranga saccifera var. genuina
intro: Macaranga saccifera var. genuina, also known as the 'Mangosteen Tree', is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Macaranga saccifera var. genuina is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine.
